findings.title: LocalGraphWidget imports GraphView directly — ADR-0007 forbids this
findings.expected: No import of GraphView. LocalGraphWidget should import GraphModal only. GraphModal internally uses GraphView.

findings.title: LocalGraphWidget uses GraphView directly in render path for inline preview
findings.expected: Extract inline preview into GraphModal or accept as allowed use-case and update ADR

findings.title: GraphView still calls useGraphData internally — ADR-0007 step 9 incomplete
findings.current: import { useGraphData } from "./useGraphData"; with skip-when-external pattern
findings.expected: GraphView should be pure rendering component accepting graph as required prop

findings.title: GraphSearch imports from graph.constants — not in allowed import set
findings.expected: GraphSearch should only import from graph.shared per ADR-0007

findings.title: dimColorsRef in graph.constants but contains no DOM access — belongs in graph.shared
findings.current: dimColorsRef is a plain mutable ref with hardcoded fallbacks, no DOM calls
findings.expected: Move to graph.shared.ts — it's isomorphic, fixes IMP-004

findings.title: GraphView accepts 7 filter props unused when external data provided — dead interface
findings.current: filterTags?, filterCategories?, filterTypes?, filterStatuses?, filterContentTypes?, filterLanguages?, tagMode?
findings.expected: Remove filter props once IMP-003 is resolved

findings.title: GraphEvents doesn't import CATEGORY_LABELS despite ADR stating it should
findings.current: Category label lookup done in GraphView render, not in GraphEvents
findings.expected: Move label resolution to GraphEvents per ADR-0007 or update ADR

findings.title: GraphView calls resolveThemeColor at render time — redundant with ThemeObserver
findings.expected: Remove — ThemeObserver handles this reactively. GraphView shouldn't import graph.constants

findings.title: GraphView imports getSigmaBackground but never uses it
